title: Dhammapada, Chapter 21: Miscellaneous
description: Chapter 21 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 21 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: If by giving up a lesser happiness one may see a greater happiness, the wise one would give up the lesser to behold the greater.
